title: Recording time clock punches
excerpt: Trying to see if anyone uses a program either within Monday or linked to Monday to record employee time clock punches in/our.  Have tried using Zapier to connect to Clockshark (what we use for employees punching in & out…

posts.author: ARose1017 (Annette Rose)
posts.cookedHtml: Trying to see if anyone uses a program either within Monday or linked to Monday to record employee time clock punches in/our. Have tried using Zapier to connect to Clockshark (what we use for employees punching in & out) but nothing seems to be working the way I need.
